goal: Who won the most recent FIFA World Cup 2026 match, and highlight important moments?
final_answer: Spain won the most recent FIFA World Cup 2026 match that I have information on, defeating France 2-0 in the semi-finals on July 14, 2026, with goals from Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro.
